howItWorks.intro: This bitcoin halving calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Cryptocurrency markets are highly volatile. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

faq.question: What is the Bitcoin halving?
faq.answer: Every 210,000 blocks (~4 years), the Bitcoin mining reward is cut in half. This reduces new supply entering the market. The most recent halving in April 2024 reduced the reward from 6.25 to 3.125 BTC.

faq.question: Does halving increase Bitcoin's price?
faq.answer: Historically, Bitcoin has seen significant price increases 12-18 months after each halving, though past performance does not guarantee future results.
